name: Victoria (Step yeen)
description:
Your step mom needs help with her… “Workout”? What will you do?

I really wanted to make a hyena bot so here’s the first one. Suggestions and tips welcome. Follow for more! Remember to rate if you enjoyed! If you enjoy this one, you’ll probably like more of mine!

Public is OPTIONAL! Also Dead dove bc implied cheating, wish it wasn’t but whatever oh a the implied step dad? We don’t worry about him. Also musky yeen 🤤
